fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number for the physical inventory order.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies a short description of the physical inventory order.

fields.name: Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies if the physical inventory order is open or finished.

fields.name: Order Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order date for the physical inventory order.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date of the physical inventory order.

fields.name: Person Responsible
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the person who is responsible for performing this physical inventory order.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 1 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 1, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: Shortcut Dimension 2 Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for Shortcut Dimension 2, which is one of two global dimension codes that you set up in the General Ledger Setup window.

fields.name: No. Finished Recordings
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of entered physical inventory recording documents that have the status set to Finished.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code of the location where items on this line should be counted.
